subcodes.first_line: O Lord! These helpless ones are enchanted by Thy countenance and, fallen upon Thy path, are intoxicated with the cup of Thy love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار این بیچارگان شیفته روی تواند و افتاده کوی تو سرمست جام هوی تواند
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @prayer for nearness to God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power of prayer, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
